title: Forest Focus
description: Step into a quiet forest at dawn. Let the gentle rustle of leaves and distant birdsong anchor your attention and clear your mind.

title: Ocean Calm
description: Soft waves, endless horizon. Let the rhythm of the ocean slow your breath and settle your thoughts.

title: Deep Sleep
description: Drift into stillness. Low tones and soft night sounds guide you gently toward deep, restorative sleep.

title: Morning Reset
description: A fresh start. Warm tones and light energy help you reset your mind and step into the day with clarity.

title: Rain Study
description: The sound of steady rain creates a cocoon of focus. Perfect for deep work, reading, or creative thinking.

title: Evening Ground
description: As the day fades, let warm ambient tones bring you back to earth. A gentle landing after a long day.
